NIPR warns of phishing emails targeting insurance producers

The National Insurance Producer Registry (NIPR) has identified an active phishing email campaign targeting producers, and immediate caution is advised. Learn more

Changes to the Rating of Automobile Insurance Policies

North Carolina residents need to be aware of changes to the rating of automobile insurance poli Learn about changes that may affect our premiums

An official website of the State of North Carolina An official website of NC

State Government websites value user privacy. To learn more, view our full privacy policy.

Secure websites use HTTPS certificates. A lock icon or https:// means you’ve safely connected to the official website.

home-page-4

Commissioner of Insurance Mike Causey

Commissioner Mike Causey’s goal as commissioner is to fight for more competition in the industry and to combat insurance fraud to drive rates lower for the North Carolina consumer.

Learn more about Commissioner Causey

Commissioner Causey sets up 2026 WebEx flood insurance conferences

Free continuing education credit offered for insurance agents, adjusters, real estate agents, engineers, architects, and land surveyors.

Register for continuing education today

NC Catastrophe Adjuster Certification

This catastrophic course will familiarize adjusters with North Carolina key issues and challenges that may affect coverage and how to address them to achieve the best coverage solution for the North Carolina consumers.

Register and take the course

We're Social

Follow us on all of our socials for the latest updates and career opportunities.

Follow our socials

Lost Life Insurance Policy Locator

Do you suspect a loved one had a life insurance policy but you can't locate it? We can help...

Policy locator

Getting help is easy...

File a complaint or get assistance

Locate a lost life insurance policy

Health claim denied? We can help.

Suspect insurance fraud? Report it.

Questions about insurance?

Insurance can be confusing. One of our most important jobs is to help educate North Carolinians about insurance-related issues or Medicare issues so you can make informed decisions for you and your family. If you have questions about insurance, we can help.

Call 855-408-1212 (toll free)

Insurance-related Questions

Medicare Questions

 

Seniors' Health Insurance Information Program (SHIIP)

Criminal Insurance Investigation

Report Insurance Fraud

MyDOI, NCDOI's First Mobile App

Download using the QR code above.

In a Disaster

North Carolina is at a high risk for a variety of natural disasters, including hurricanes, tornadoes, winter storms, floods, wildfires, earthquakes, and mudslides. The North Carolina Department of Insurance encourages proper planning so that citizens are in a better position to protect their families and to recover from a natural disaster.

Are you prepared?

  • Assistance or File a Complaint
  • Health Insurance Claim Denied?
  • Report Insurance Fraud
  • Check Company License Status

  • Check Bail Bondsman License Status
  • Download Our Mobile App
  • Bulletins
  • Become an Insurance Agent or Adjuster
  • Find Licensing Actions
  • File a Service of Legal Process with the Commissioner of Insurance
